file_name: Questionnaire - MA Financial - Gold Coast City Marina.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if the MA Marina Fund (as outlined above, including the Pacific Point Marina on the Gold Coast and the East Coast Marina) and the Gold Coast City Marina are close competitors and there are not many alternatives, or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with MA Financial, the Acquirers, the MA Marina Portfolio and/or the Gold Coast City Marina.
